change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

physdesc.extent: 1 folder. 1 reel positive, 1 reel negative microfilm.,

did.abstract: Microfilm of letters, speeches, and newspaper clippings; Also one undated photograph of McGinnies, and two programs.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Joseph McGinnies was a member of the New York State Assembly from 1915-1934 and speaker of the Assembly from 1925-1934.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The Joseph McGinnies papers contain microfilm of letters, speeches, and newspaper clippings dealing with New York State and Chautauqua County politics, mainly during the years McGinnies was a member of the Assembly. The microfilm includes a copy of an address by James Farley given at a testimonial dinner for Mr. Farley by the Democratic Rural County Chairmen's Association, Syracuse, N.Y., September 20, 1941, reprinted in the Congressional Record; copy of an address by the Permanent Chairman, the Hon. Joseph A. McGinnies, Speaker of the Assembly, before the Republican State Convention at Albany, September 26, 1930; copy of an address by McGinnies, George Washington in the Hearts of His Countrymen, undated; copy of a radio address by McGinnies concerning the role of New York City in state politics and the problem of representation and apportionment in the state legislature; congratulations on reaching his 80th birthday. The collection also contains one undated photograph of McGinnies in the company of Mayor James J. Walker, and two programs for a Chautauqua County testimonial dinner held in McGinnies' honor.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related collection:Chautauqua County Republican Party Committee. Minute Book, #1945.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Joseph McGinnies papers, #1943. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
